name: Postal
description: Postal — Open-source self-hosted mail server and transactional email platform with SMTP and HTTP API.

seo.title: Postal — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Postal: Postal — Open-source self-hosted mail server and transactional email platform with SMTP and HTTP API.

when_to_use: Self-hosted transactional email server for full data control
SMTP relay for a SaaS app without relying on third-party ESP
Open-source Mailgun alternative on owned infrastructure
HTTP API email sending integrated with a self-hosted stack
High-volume mailing list on own servers for privacy compliance

pros: Full open-source SMTP + HTTP API server
Self-hosted means no per-email SaaS fees
Good choice for EU data residency needs
Web UI for managing messages and queues
cons: Running your own IPs hurts deliverability early
Less polished than Postmark or SES
review.verdict: Viable self-hosted transactional mail for teams committed to mail ops; painful otherwise.
review.best_for: Privacy-focused teams with SRE capacity to manage mail servers
review.not_for: Product teams who just want a reliable email API

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
